TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – The Seed Launch - Part One
Executive Summary:
• 	I know many of you have been waiting for this and are excited to learn the process.
The Seed Launch is a great place to start because you don’t need a list or product
• 	It’s a very interactive process - this makes it easy to build relationships and get
feedback and case studies. It’s an easy, simple launch to do that can lead to a much
bigger launch
• 	In The Business Launch Formula, you learned about how the PLF business was
started entirely from a Seed Launch. This is how you create a great product right out
of the gate
• 	Most of us are not trained teachers or trainers - we don’t instinctively know how to
teach correctly or appropriately
• 	There’s also something to be careful of that I call the “curse of knowledge”
o This is what happens when you forget the basics and are teaching about
something you’re an expert in)
o You’re likely an expert in whatever you want to create a product about. As an
expert it’s very hard to remember what it was like to be a beginner. You have
so much knowledge and the beginner stuff is as simple as breathing for you
now
o Example: when you were one-year-old walking was difficult, but you don’t
have to think about it anymore
• 	The Seed Launch helps you avoid that “curse of knowledge”. It’s also very interactive
- lots of teleseminars or webinars
• 	Through surveys you perform before and after each call, you’ll find out what they
really want to know, where the gaps are, and what you need to revisit or teach better
• 	This is how and why Product Launch Formula 1.0 was so great. The first 6 students
from the Seed Launch gave the feedback needed. This made it possible to get
feedback that made the product better, but also made the teaching more effective
!
!
!

TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – The Seed Launch - Part One
• 	Keep in mind, the Seed Launch is not just for beginners. If you have a business but
want to launch a new product, this is a fantastic way to get started. It prevents
procrastination because you get paid and are forced to create the product (Eben
Pagan calls this “inevitability thinking”)
• 	I recently did a Seed Launch - it was a deep dive on a topic I’ve been teaching for
years. I learned so much more about my clients and where they were at in their lives
with all the PLF teachings
• 	It brought in money, created a great product, and lead to new learnings
When to Use a Seed Launch
• 	You don’t have an email list
• 	You don’t have a product
• 	You’re just starting out and you’re a beginner
• 	You have an idea for a product but aren’t sure it it will work
• 	You don’t have experience teaching and need feedback
• 	You need testimonials and case studies to prove your teaching works
• 	You have a business and you want to launch a new product
• 	You have a business and you want to make sure your new product is a success
• 	You want to get leverage on creating your product and get paid in advance for it
• 	You want to do a simple, easy launch
• 	You want to make sure your customers actually want your product
• 	You want to gauge demand for your new idea
!
!
!

TRANSCRIPT
MODULE Three – The Seed Launch - Part One
TRANSCRIPT:
Now we're going to talk about the Seed Launch and I know a lot of
people are really excited about this. The Seed Launch is an absolutely great way to
start. It's a great place to start. This is where you start if you have no list, no
product. It's the absolute easiest way to create a product.
And because it's a very interactive process, and you end up working fairly
closely with people as you go through it. It's great for getting testimonials and case
studies, because you naturally build this relationship with the people that are going
through it.
It's an easy, simple launch to do and it can lead to a much bigger launch. In
the Business Launch Formula, I talked about how I started this business of teaching
product launches, this Product Launch Formula business. I started it with a Seed
Launch. It's how I created a great product right out of the gate.
Not many of us are trained educators, not many of us know instinctively how
to teach whatever we're experts on. And there is this thing called the Curse of
Knowledge and it is the idea that whatever you're going to be teaching about,
whatever you're creating your product about, you are some type of an expert, and as
an expert, it's very hard to remember what it was like to be a beginner.
Whether it's mountain biking or playing the guitar or playing tennis or
building a social media presence or whatever it is, you're an expert and it's hard to
remember when you first started out. That's just the way it is, because you have so
much knowledge and the beginner stuff, you don't even have to think about. So it's
almost like breathing.
There was a time when walking was very difficult for you and for me. When
we were about one-year-old, walking was really difficult, but now we don't have to
think about it. We don't have to think about all the things we do to walk across the
room. If you're teaching tennis, you've just forgotten how many things have to
happen to actually hit that ball.
The Seed Launch helps you avoid that Curse of Knowledge, because it's very
interactive. All the way through, you are doing teleseminars or webinars and each
!
!
!

MODULE Three – The Seed Launch - Part One
time you are surveying people before the calls and after the calls. You are finding out
where the gaps are – what you need to be teaching, what they really want to know,
what you have to revisit and teach better.
And that's how I created a great product with Product Launch Formula right
out of the gate. My very first version was awesome, because it really wasn't my first
version, it was the second version. The Seed Launch I had done for it, those first six
people that I sold it to, they taught me how to teach. They taught me what my blind
spots were as an expert. That's why Seed Launches are great.
You make money, you get paid before the product creation. You get paid right
up front, then you create the product. You get those testimonials and those case
studies and you just create a great product. It's awesome.
The only thing is that it isn't just for beginners, it's absolutely not just for
beginners. If you have a current business, but you have an idea for a new product and
you want to roll that out and you want to get paid before you create the product. You
want to hold your feet to the fire so that you actually create the product.
A lot of us are really good at procrastinating when it comes to product
creation. Yes, right, sometimes I've been known to procrastinate a little bit on
product creation. This way you get paid and now you have to create the product. My
friend, Eben Pagan, calls this an inevitability thinking. You set up a situation where
you have to perform.
Seed Launches are great if you have a current business and you want to create
a new product, you want to test out a product idea. I just did a Seed Launch a few
months ago. It was absolutely awesome. It was about a topic that I've been teaching
for years and years and I've had tons of clients and students go through, but I put
together what I called a “Deep Dive.” I took this topic and I created a super deep level
training or a higher level training for this topic.
I learned so much about my clients and where they were at in their current
lives and where they were at in terms of using my teaching. It helped me learn an
incredible amount about that topic and about my overall client base. It was really
great. I brought in a bunch of money, it helped me create a great product that I'm
going to be using in the future, and it helped me learn an unbelievable amount.
Seed Launches are great, whether you have an existing business and you want
